ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Convert Google Docs styled paragraphs into Markdown headings using the font-size thresholds.
ast.target: 使用字体大小阈值将 Google Docs 样式的段落转换为 Markdown 标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep underlined text as <u>...</u> (Markdown has no native underline).
ast.target: 将带下划线的文本保留为 <u>...</u>（Markdown 没有原生下划线）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep font color as inline <span style="color:...">.
ast.target: 将字体颜色保留为内联 <span style=\"color:...\">。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep highlight color as inline <span style="background-color:...">.
ast.target: 将高亮颜色保留为内联 <span style=\"background-color:...\">。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace https://www.google.com/url?q=... with the underlying destination URL.
ast.target: 将 https://www.google.com/url?q=... 替换为底层目标 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download Google-hosted images into the attachments folder instead of linking to remote URLs.
ast.target: 将 Google 托管的图像下载到附件文件夹，而不是链接到远程 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Troubleshooting only. On every paste, show a Notice listing the clipboard MIME types and a preview of any HTML payload. Use this on mobile to confirm whether Google Docs is actually putting HTML on the clipboard.
ast.target: 仅用于故障排除。每次粘贴时，显示一个通知，列出剪贴板 MIME 类型和任何 HTML 负载的预览。在移动设备上使用此功能可确认 Google Docs 是否确实将 HTML 放入了剪贴板。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 解包 Google 重定向链接

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将粘贴的图像保存到保险库

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 粘贴时显示剪贴板信息
